name: Nippon Primex Inc.
summary: Nippon Primex Inc. manufactures and sells printers and other electronic equipment in Japan. It offers kiosk, mobile and portable, and POS printers; mechanism and control boards; and options and accessories, such as power supplies, paper presenters, paper bezels, paper holders, and cash drawers. The company also provides software supporting tools; and printer drivers. In addition, it engages in the controlling, buying, and selling of real estate properties. The company also exports its kiosk printers to the United States, the European Union, and internationally. Nippon Primex Inc. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
